title: anacamptis × timbali nothosubsp. reinhardii
intro: Anacamptis × timbali nothosubsp. reinhardii, also known as Rein's orchid or Rein's pyramidal orchid, is a rare, hybrid orchid species resulting from the cross between Anacamptis morio and Anacamptis pyramidalis. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which are attributed to its saponin, flavonoid, and alkaloid content. The health benefits of Anacamptis × timbali nothosubsp. reinhardii include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, Anacamptis × timbali nothosubsp. reinhardii is often used in tinctures, infusions, and decoctions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a medicinal plant.
